description_long: This is a black wireless game controller, most closely resembling the design of an Xbox 360 controller. The front face features two analog sticks, a directional pad, four colored action buttons (green, red, blue, and yellow), and a central Xbox logo button. The top edge includes two shoulder buttons and two triggers, as well as a battery compartment at the rear. The controller is ergonomically shaped with contoured grips for comfortable handheld use. The surface is primarily matte black plastic with some glossy highlights around the buttons and logo. This object is typically used for gaming and can be found in living rooms, gaming cafes, or urban recreational spaces.
description: A black ergonomic wireless game controller with colored buttons, dual analog sticks, and a central logo button, resembling an Xbox 360 controller. It features contoured grips and a matte plastic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all main controls: analog sticks, D-pad, colored action buttons, and the central logo button.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the right grip, colored buttons, and the raised profile of the analog sticks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment and the two shoulder triggers.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the left, showing the left grip, analog stick, and the side profile of the controller.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, analog sticks, D-pad, triggers
